case_title: NAY, MARY vs. MOORHOUSE,DANIEL et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NAY, MARY AS TO DEFENDANT MOORHOUSE,DANIEL ELLIS, PAUL SUMMONS ISSUED

ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 218 FOR TRIAL. PARTIES STIPULATED TO COMMISSIONER LORETTA M. NORRIS AS JUDGE PRO TEM. REPORTED BY KENT GUBBINE, CSR# 5797. CLERKED BY GARTH SAYERS. PLAINTIFF APPEARED THROUGH COUNSEL. DEFENDANT APPEARED IN PRO PER. A HEARING WAS HELD IN WHICH WITNESSES WERE SWORN AND DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE WAS RECEIVED & RETURNED. PARTIES REACHED AN AGREEMENT THAT WAS THEN READ ON THE RECORD. IF DEFENDANT MAKES THE AGREED UPON PAYMENTS THROUGH OCTOBER 1, 1999, THEN THE PLAINTIFF WILL FILE A DISMISSAL. SHOULD DEFENDANT MISS A PAYMENT, THE PLAINTIFF WILL FILE FOR A JUGMENT BASED UPON THE AGREEMENT AS PUT ON THE RECORD THIS DAY.
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE CHIANTELLI FILED BY PLAINTIFF NAY, MARY
REMOVED FROM COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON JUL-12-1999 IN DEPT. 218 - CASE SETTLES ON THE RECORD, AFTER THE SWEARING IN OF WITNESSES AND THE INTRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE.
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF NAY, MARY COURT TRIAL SET FOR JUL-12-1999 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 218 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
